description: Identifies RDS cost inefficiencies from instance over-sizing, nonessential Multi-AZ, storage/IOPS over-provisioning, Extended Support, and reserved instance coverage gaps while protecting availability and performance.

cost.pricing_source: Static fallback estimate. Prefer AWS Pricing MCP, AWS Pricing API, or cost_report region-specific pricing when available.
cost.note: RDS pricing varies by engine, region, deployment type, storage, IOPS, backup, Extended Support, and reserved instance coverage. Multi-AZ cost impact should be verified by engine/deployment type.

severity_rules.name: multi_az_non_prod_review
severity_rules.condition: multi_az == true AND environment_tag IN non_prod_env_tags AND no SLA/DR/compliance requirement evidence
severity_rules.description: Multi-AZ may be unnecessary for non-production, but disabling it changes availability and maintenance/failover posture. Validate SLA, RTO/RPO, backup, and owner approval first.

severity_rules.name: instance_underutilization_confirmed
severity_rules.condition: cpu_avg < cpu_utilization_avg_max_pct AND cpu_p95 < cpu_utilization_p95_max_pct_for_downsize AND freeable_memory_safe == true AND io_utilization_p95 < read_write_iops_utilization_p95_max_pct AND database_connections_avg >= database_connections_avg_min
severity_rules.description: Instance appears oversized across CPU, memory, I/O, and connection evidence. Downsize conservatively during a maintenance window with rollback monitoring.

severity_rules.name: storage_iops_overprovisioned
severity_rules.condition: provisioned_storage_iops_or_throughput greatly exceeds observed p95 usage AND storage_free_space_safe == true
severity_rules.description: Provisioned storage, IOPS, or throughput may exceed workload needs. Validate storage growth, latency, queue depth, and storage type constraints before changing.

severity_rules.name: extended_support_cost
severity_rules.condition: engine_version past standard support AND Extended Support charges present
severity_rules.description: RDS Extended Support charges can materially increase cost. Plan engine upgrade after compatibility testing.

severity_rules.name: reserved_instance_coverage_candidate
severity_rules.description: Steady retained RDS capacity may benefit from Reserved DB Instances. Model term, payment option, and utilization risk before purchase.

severity_rules.name: performance_risk_blocks_downsize
severity_rules.condition: cpu_peak_high == true OR freeable_memory_low == true OR swap_high == true OR io_latency_high == true OR disk_queue_high == true OR replica_lag_high == true
severity_rules.description: Performance risk evidence exists. Do not downsize until CPU, memory, I/O, storage, and replica/failover behavior are reviewed.

downsize_recommendations.note: Use only after p95/peak CPU, memory, I/O, and connection checks pass.

validation_before_change: Check CPU avg/p95/max, freeable memory, swap, connections, IOPS, throughput, latency, disk queue, storage free, replica lag, and failover needs.
Create a snapshot and schedule a maintenance window.
Check reserved instance coverage before changing class/family.
Confirm SLA, RTO/RPO, compliance, and owner approval before disabling Multi-AZ.
reporting: Separate instance, Multi-AZ, storage, IOPS, backup, Extended Support, and RI savings.
Use region-specific and engine-specific pricing when available.
Report confidence based on metric and cost line-item coverage.
